title: rubus brachystemon
intro: Rubus brachystemon, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus brachystemon include reducing pain and swelling, as well as protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus brachystemon are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
